description_long: This object is a stylized coconut palm tree with a tall, cylindrical trunk featuring alternating light and dark brown horizontal stripes, mimicking the texture of a real palm. The trunk is slightly curved in some views, giving it a natural, organic appearance. At the top, a cluster of large, broad, green leaves radiates outward, each leaf displaying a prominent central vein and angular, geometric segmentation. The leaves are arranged in a circular pattern, forming a canopy that shades the top of the trunk. At the center of the leaf cluster, a brown, polygonal shape represents the coconut fruit, partially embedded and visible from above. The overall design is simplified and cartoon-like, with clean lines and bold color contrasts.
description: A stylized coconut palm tree with a striped, curved trunk and a canopy of large, segmented green leaves, topped by a central brown coconut.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight trunk and symmetrical spread of green leaves with the brown coconut at the center.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the trunk and the layered arrangement of the leaves around the coconut.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the radial symmetry of the leaves and the central position of the coconut.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the pronounced curve of the trunk and the overhanging leaves.
attribute_husk_pattern: The outer surface of the coconut at the top is polygonal and smooth, lacking visible fibrous texture or detailed markings. The trunk displays horizontal striping, while the leaves have prominent, stylized veins.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The coconut is attached to the top of a palm tree trunk, forming the crown of the tree.
